items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Although the gameplay is similar to othe
items.summary: Although the gameplay is similar to other card games, what impresses me most in the game is the drawing style of the characters and graphics. It is elegant, luxurious, noble, sophisticated, full of British style. Besides, the game optimization is also good and suitable for weak phones so the experience is still smooth. However, I still hope that the Vietnamese translation will be improved because there are some sentences that are not translated clearly, making it difficult to grasp the meaning
items.author: Đức Huy 11-910
